title: BrightAU Capital Pty Ltd — Consumer harm
investigation_objective: Traded as TradeFred; a former authorised representative of Union Standard International Group found by the Federal Court to have engaged in systemic unconscionable conduct, part of the $300.2 million combined penalty action.
scope: Found by the Federal Court to have engaged in systemic unconscionable conduct as an authorised representative of Union Standard, part of a $300.2 million combined penalty action
